schema.description: Payload to create or update a file spec

name.description: Unique human-readable name for the spec

description.description: Optional description of what this spec represents
description.example: ACME Corp daily payment file, pipe-delimited

encoding.description: Character encoding of the source file

hasHeader.description: Whether the first data row is a header row (CSV/delimited)

skipLinesCount.description: Number of lines to skip at the top of the file (e.g. file-level header)

items.description: Describes a single field within the file

columnName.description: Column header name (CSV/delimited with hasHeader: true)

required.description: Whether the field must be present

nullable.description: Whether an empty/null value is acceptable

defaultValue.description: Value to use when field is absent or null

validationRegex.description: Regular expression the field value must match

sensitive.description: PII flag — value will be masked in logs and traces

items.title: FieldSpec

items.description: A validation rule applied to a field after parsing

ruleId.description: Unique identifier for this rule within the spec

field.description: Name of the field this rule applies to

value.description: Primary comparison value (e.g. min value, regex pattern, allowed list)

message.description: Human-readable error message when the rule fails

severity.description: Severity level of a validation error
severity.title: Severity

items.title: ValidationRule

items.description: An auto-correction applied to a field value before or after validation

ruleId.description: Unique identifier for this rule within the spec

field.description: Name of the field to correct

value.description: Correction parameter (e.g. default value, replacement string, pad character)

applyOrder.description: Execution order when multiple corrections apply to the same field (lower = first)

items.title: CorrectionRule

outputSpec.description: Describes the output format when transforming from one file format to another

delimiter.description: Field delimiter for delimited output formats

hasHeader.description: Whether to write a header row

items.description: Maps a source field to a target field in the output spec

sourceField.description: Name of the field in the input spec

targetField.description: Name of the field in the output spec

transformation.description: Optional SpEL expression to transform the value

items.title: FieldMapping

outputSpec.title: OutputSpec

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata (owner, environment, tags, etc.)

schema.title: CreateSpecRequest
